privileged_info_summary: The expected blog post configuration is synthetically generated from task instructions and verified by programmatic checks. The target blog post title is explicitly 'The Future of Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare', with the status 'publish', the category 'Technology', and exactly four tags: 'AI, healthcare, technology, featured'. The content requires a minimum length of 100 (checked as characters in verifier.py despite the prompt requesting words) and must include the five specified keywords ('artificial intelligence', 'healthcare', 'diagnostics', 'treatment', 'patient care'). All metadata values exactly match the evaluation logic in export_result.sh and verifier.py.
